nasb.text: He said to his lad, “Run, find now the arrows which I am about to shoot.” As the lad was running, he shot an arrow past him.

esv.text: And he said to his boy, “Run and find the arrows that I shoot.” As the boy ran, he shot an arrow beyond him.

cnv.text: 他對那童僕說：“你跑去，把我所射的箭找回來。”那童僕跑去的時候，約拿單就把箭射到他前面。

ccb.text: 约拿单对少年说：“你跑去把我射的箭拾回来。”少年就向前跑去，约拿单把箭射在他前面。
